description: Per-profile SAT verdicts from the 2026-07-05 session. Solver: CaDiCaL 1.9.5 via PySAT; encoding: triple-coverage at-most-2 (sequential counter), exact column degrees, double-lex symmetry breaking. NO proof traces were retained: these verdicts are corroborating evidence only and no repository claim rests on them. See docs/NEW_BOUNDS.md section 6.

frontier_observations.implication: All 11 profiles at 114 returned UNSAT. At 113, 24 profiles returned UNSAT and the remaining profile 1x1,5x20,6x2 is excluded by the repository's arithmetic profile filter (equivalently, deleting its degree-one column contradicts Z(10,22,3,3)=110). Modulo the unlogged solver verdicts, Z(10,23,3,3) <= 112; Bhan--Nobili--Langer's 112-one construction then gives Z(10,23,3,3) = 112. This solver-assisted value is deliberately NOT entered in analysis/new_bounds.json, which stays solver-free.

repository_targets_cross_check.review_note: The degree-profile catalogs and encoding were independently checked during the 2026-07-06 integration review, but the large UNSAT verdicts could not be certified because the original run retained no formulas, logs, or proof traces. Z(10,23,3,3)=112 is therefore not a repository theorem.
